mapper.select: select id from tbl_member order by id asc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_work ( member_id, title, category, description, price, license_type, license_terms, is_tradable, allow_comment, show_similar, link_url, status ) values ( #{memberId}, #{title}, #{category}, #{description}, #{price}, #{licenseType}, #{licenseTerms}, coalesce(#{isTradable}, false), coalesce(#{allowComment}, true), coalesce(#{showSimilar}, true), #{linkUrl}, coalesce(#{status}, 'ACTIVE') )
mapper.update: update tbl_work set title = #{title}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, license_type = #{licenseType}, license_terms = #{licenseTerms}, is_tradable = #{isTradable}, allow_comment = #{allowComment}, show_similar = #{showSimilar}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, status = coalesce(#{status}, status), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id} and deleted_datetime is null
update tbl_work set status = 'DELETED', deleted_datetime = now(), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id} and deleted_datetime is null
mapper.select: select id, member_id, title, category, description, price, license_type, license_terms, is_tradable, allow_comment, show_similar, link_url, view_count, like_count, save_count, comment_count, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_work where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_work set view_count = coalesce(view_count, 0) + 1, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id} and deleted_datetime is null
mapper.select: select w.id, ( select gw.gallery_id from tbl_gallery_work gw where gw.work_id = w.id order by gw.id asc limit 1 ) as gallery_id, w.member_id, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.profile_image as member_profile_image, w.title, w.category, w.description, w.price, w.license_type, w.license_terms, w.is_tradable, w.allow_comment, w.show_similar, w.link_url, w.view_count, w.like_count, w.save_count, w.comment_count, w.status, false as is_liked, false as is_bookmarked, w.created_datetime, w.updated_datetime, w.deleted_datetime from tbl_work w left join tbl_member m on w.member_id = m.id where w.id = #{id} and w.deleted_datetime is null
select id, work_id, file_url, file_type, file_size, width, height, sort_order, created_datetime from tbl_work_file where work_id = #{workId} order by sort_order asc, id asc
select tag_id from tbl_work_tag where work_id = #{workId} order by id asc

select id, tag_name from tbl_tag where lower(tag_name) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by case when lower(tag_name) like concat(#{keyword}, '%') then 0 else 1 end, length(tag_name) asc, tag_name asc limit #{limit}
select t.id, t.tag_name from tbl_work_tag wt join tbl_tag t on wt.tag_id = t.id where wt.work_id = #{workId} order by t.tag_name asc
mapper.update: update tbl_work set comment_count = coalesce(comment_count, 0) + 1, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{workId} and deleted_datetime is null
update tbl_work set comment_count = greatest(coalesce(comment_count, 0) - 1, 0), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{workId} and deleted_datetime is null
mapper.select: select c.id, c.member_id, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.profile_image as member_profile_image, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.is_pinned, c.like_count, false as is_liked, c.created_datetime, c.updated_datetime from tbl_comment c left join tbl_member m on c.member_id = m.id where c.target_type = 'WORK' and c.target_id = #{workId} and c.parent_id is null and c.deleted_datetime is null order by c.created_datetime asc, c.id asc
select exists ( select 1 from tbl_auction where work_id = #{workId} and status = 'ACTIVE' and closing_at > now() )

select exists ( select 1 from tbl_auction latest where latest.id = ( select a.id from tbl_auction a where a.work_id = #{workId} order by a.created_datetime desc, a.id desc limit 1 ) and (latest.status != 'ACTIVE' or latest.closing_at <= now()) )
mapper.update: update tbl_work set like_count = coalesce(like_count, 0) + 1, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{workId} and deleted_datetime is null
update tbl_work set like_count = greatest(coalesce(like_count, 0) - 1, 0), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{workId} and deleted_datetime is null
mapper.select: select coalesce(like_count, 0) from tbl_work where id = #{workId} and deleted_datetime is null
